paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a sparse attention mechanism called BIGBIRD that reduces quadratic complexity to linear by combining random, local window, and global attention patterns, preserving theoretical properties like universal approximation and Turing completeness.
raw_extraction.application: Question answering, document summarization, genomics data processing (promoter region/chromatin profile prediction)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling Transformers to longer sequences without quadratic memory/compute constraints
raw_extraction.extension: Combines random attention, sliding window attention, and global tokens (either internal or extended) into a unified sparse attention mechanism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **BIGBIRD** introduces a sparse attention mechanism called **Block-sparse Global Context Attention**, which enables linear scalability with sequence length while preserving expressive power through extra global tokens. This contrasts with standard Transformers by replacing dense attention with a structured sparsity pattern.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Standard datasets (listed in Appendix E.1, Table 9), including Wikipedia, BooksCorpus, and others; warm-started from public RoBERTa checkpoint
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks requiring long contexts (e.g., long document classification, multi-hop reasoning, genomics), Question Answering (HotpotQA, NaturalQuestions, TriviaQA, WikiHop), Document Summarization, Genomics (DNA sequence analysis)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling Transformer architectures to handle long sequences efficiently without quadratic complexity
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning (cross-entropy loss on [CLS] token for classification tasks)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses **expanded global tokens** to preserve expressiveness while maintaining linear complexity
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **BIGBIRD-Large** extends the sparse attention mechanism to encoder-decoder architectures for long-document summarization, leveraging **Pegasus-style pretraining** for better performance on generative tasks. It combines sparse attention in the encoder with full attention in the decoder for efficiency.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Long document datasets (Arxiv, PubMed, BigPatent) + human reference genome (GRCh37) for genomics; warm-started from Pegasus for summarization
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive summarization of long documents (Arxiv, PubMed, patents), DNA sequence analysis (promoter prediction, chromatin profile prediction)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Handling long-document summarization and genomics tasks with sparse attention mechanisms
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Generative fine-tuning for summarization tasks (e.g., abstractive summarization)
raw_extraction.extension: Combines **sparse attention in encoder + full attention in decoder** for efficient long-document processing
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **BIGBIRD-ITC** implements an iterative token context mechanism where each token attends to previous tokens iteratively, improving long-range dependencies. This variant focuses on **iterative sparse attention** for enhanced reasoning capabilities.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving long-range dependency modeling in QA tasks with iterative sparse attention
raw_extraction.extension: **Iterative token context attention** enables progressive refinement of token representations
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **BIGBIRD-ETC** introduces expanded token context by incorporating **additional global tokens** into the sparse attention mechanism, enhancing the model’s ability to capture distant dependencies. This variant achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks.
raw_extraction.application: Question Answering (HotpotQA, NaturalQuestions, TriviaQA, WikiHop), Long Document Classification, Abstractive Summarization, Genomics (DNA sequence analysis)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling long-range dependency modeling in NLP tasks with expanded token context
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning for QA and classification tasks
raw_extraction.extension: **Global token expansion** preserves long-range dependencies while maintaining linear complexity
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **Block-Sparse Attention Mechanism**: Introduces a novel sparse attention pattern called *Block-Sparse Attention* to efficiently handle long sequences by partitioning input into blocks and selectively attending within and across blocks, reducing quadratic complexity.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpus (not explicitly named in abstract but referenced in appendix)
raw_extraction.application: Long-document understanding, reading comprehension, and tasks requiring extended context windows
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to longer input sequences while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.extension: *Random Dropout*: Uses randomized dropout patterns to further improve sparsity and robustness.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **Block-Sparse Attention Mechanism**: Introduces a novel sparse attention pattern called *Block-Sparse Attention* to efficiently handle long sequences by partitioning input into blocks and selectively attending within and across blocks, reducing quadratic complexity.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpus (not explicitly named in abstract but referenced in appendix)
raw_extraction.application: Long-document understanding, reading comprehension, and tasks requiring extended context windows
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to longer input sequences while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.extension: *Random Dropout*: Uses randomized dropout patterns to further improve sparsity and robustness.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **sparse attention patterns** (BigBird blocks) to efficiently process long sequences without quadratic complexity, leveraging selective shift operators and structured sparsity graphs.
raw_extraction.application: Long-document processing, sequence modeling, Turing-complete simulations via sparse attention mechanisms
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling Transformer architectures to handle long sequences efficiently without quadratic memory/compute overhead.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with sparse attention mechanisms
raw_extraction.extension: **Structured sparsity graphs** enable long-range dependencies via localized attention patterns, reducing computational cost while preserving performance on long sequences.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Block-Attention** mechanism combining random, window-local, and global attention to efficiently scale transformer models to long sequences while maintaining computational efficiency.
raw_extraction.application: Long-document processing, question answering, masked language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to handle long sequences efficiently while preserving accuracy and reducing computational costs.
raw_extraction.extension: **Intermediate Token Compression (ITC)** reduces memory overhead by selectively attending to intermediate tokens during training, improving scalability without sacrificing performance.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Block-Attention** mechanism combining random, window-local, and global attention to efficiently scale transformer models to long sequences while maintaining computational efficiency.
raw_extraction.application: Long-document processing, question answering, masked language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to handle long sequences efficiently while preserving accuracy and reducing computational costs.
raw_extraction.extension: **Explicit Token Compression (ETC)** replaces positional embeddings with relative position encoding to improve long-range dependency modeling in sparse attention settings.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Block-Attention** mechanism combining random, window-local, and global attention to efficiently scale transformer models to long sequences while maintaining computational efficiency.
raw_extraction.application: Long-document processing, question answering, masked language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to handle long sequences efficiently while preserving accuracy and reducing computational costs.
raw_extraction.extension: **Increased hidden dimension (1024) and larger batch size (2048) for improved performance.** Uses blockified attention for optimized GPU/TPU computation.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **Global-local attention with sparse connections** enables efficient long-range dependencies without quadratic complexity, using a combination of global tokens (fixed positions) and local windows with random connections. The ITC variant uses fixed global tokens for initial segments (e.g., CLS, question, or paragraph-level tokens)
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpora (general domain), TriviaQA, HotpotQA, Natural Questions, WikiHop, Genomic datasets (GRCh37)
raw_extraction.application: Question answering (TriviaQA, HotpotQA, Natural Questions), document classification (IMDb, Yelp-5, Arxiv, Patents, Hyperpartisan), summarization (CNN/DailyMail, XSUM), genomic sequence analysis (promoter region prediction, chromatin profile prediction), GLUE benchmark tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from Google AI practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable transformer architectures for long-sequence processing while maintaining efficiency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Question Answering, Document Classification, Summarization, Genomic Tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Random token connections enhance sparsity and improve generalization over purely windowed or global-only attention
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **Event-time coding (ETC)** dynamically assigns global tokens based on semantic structure (e.g., per-paragraph or per-candidate answer), reducing fixed overhead while preserving contextual awareness. This variant outperforms ITC in structured inputs like multi-hop reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpora (general domain), TriviaQA, HotpotQA, Natural Questions, WikiHop, Genomic datasets (GRCh37)
raw_extraction.application: Question answering (HotpotQA, WikiHop), document classification (IMDb, Yelp-5, Arxiv, Patents, Hyperpartisan), summarization (BBC-XSUM, CNN/DailyMail), genomic tasks (promoter region prediction, chromatin profile prediction), GLUE benchmark tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from Google AI practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable transformer architectures for long-sequence processing with dynamic global attention allocation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Question Answering, Document Classification, Summarization, Genomic Tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Dynamic global token selection via event-time coding reduces computational overhead for variable-length structures
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

raw_extraction.innovation: **Hybrid sparse attention** combines BIGBIRD’s global-local mechanism with RoBERTa’s pretrained weights, enabling long-document summarization without truncation. Warm-started from RoBERTa checkpoints for faster convergence
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: General text corpora (aligned with RoBERTa pretraining)
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive summarization (CNN/DailyMail, XSUM), GLUE benchmark tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from Google AI practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Long-document summarization with minimal truncation loss
raw_extraction.extension: Shared query/key/value matrices between encoder and decoder layers for efficient warm-starting
raw_extraction.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences
